title: Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{MagazineIssue |image=[[File:TechJournal2.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Technical Journal
of the Imperial Forces'' |editor=[[David Hutchison]] |cover artist= |contributors=[[Lora Johnson]] |publisher=[[Starlog Communications International]] |release date=*[[July]] [[1994]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/101|text=Imperial Forces}} *[[1996]] {{C|Special Edition}}''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces]]'', pg. 11, notes that the magazine's three Special Edition volumes were published prior to [[September 15]], [[1996]]. |subscribers= |pages=82 |isbn= |issn= |genre= |issue=2 |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces''''', also styled as '''''Star Wars Technical Journal Vol. 2''''', was the second of three volumes in ''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' magazine series from [[Starlog Communications International]]. It was published in [[July]] [[1994]]. The three issues were later compiled into the compendium title ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]''. In [[1996]], to celebrate the upcoming release of ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition]]'', Starlog reprinted all three volumes of the ''Technical Journal'' as "Special Edition" versions. Each Special Edition volume came in a sealed poly bag along with bonus content in the form of an eight-page gatefold supplement. A German-language version was also released in 1996 by [[Modern Graphics Distribution]].{{WebCite|url=https://jedi-bibliothek.de/datenbank/ausgabe/technisches-handbuch-der-imperialen-streitkraefte|text=Star Wars Sonderband 2: Technisches Handbuch der Imperialen Streitkräfte|work=Jedi-Bibliothek.de|archivedate=20230605144815}} {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *A Brief History of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|Speeder Bike]] *Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] *Main Bridge Plan *[[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series Spacecraft]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]] *[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] *[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] *[[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] *[[TIE pilot|TIE Fighter Pilot]] *[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] Hangar *[[Death Star/Legends|The Death Star]] *[[Emperor's Throne Room/Legends|Emperor's Throne Room]] *Death Star Reactor Core *[[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|Interrogation Droid]] *Imperial [[Walker/Legends|Walkers]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] *[[Darth Vader's armor/Legends|Vader's Body Armor]] *Vader's [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] *Vader's Belt Boxes *Vader's Mask *Vader's Chest Box (Life Systems Computer) *[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial Shuttle]] *Imperial Landing Platform *[[Viper probe droid/Legends|Imperial Probe Droid]] *[[Blaster/Legends|Blaster Weapons]] *[[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|Blaster Rifle]] *[[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Blaster Pistol]] ====Foldouts==== *[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] *Death Star *Imperial AT-AT *[[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|Imperial Landing Craft]] {{C|Special Edition - Supplement 2}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|0912849143}}, [[July 1|July]] [[1994]], [[Starlog Communications International]], first edition *{{ISBN|7189649172}}, [[1996]], Starlog Communications International, Inc., Special Edition *1996, [[Modern Graphics Distribution]], German edition ===Cover gallery=== File:TechJournal2.jpg|Cover File:Star_Wars_Technical_Journal_Vol_2_Special_Edition.jpg|Special Edition, bagged File:Star_Wars_Technical_Journal_Vol_2_German.jpg|German edition ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces }} [[Category:The Official Star Wars Technical Journal issues]]
